description_long: This is a cylindrical red can with a glossy metallic finish, featuring the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo prominently displayed vertically along one side. The can has a standard pull-tab opening mechanism on the top, which is silver in color and slightly raised from the surface. The body of the can is smooth and seamless, with a uniform red color wrapping around the entire surface except for the logo area. The bottom and top rims are slightly indented, giving the can structural rigidity and a classic soda can silhouette. No additional graphics, text, or nutritional information are visible on the can's exterior, and the back and sides are plain red.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with a white script logo and a silver pull-tab top. The can is smooth, cylindrical, and features no additional graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white Coca-Cola script logo on a red background and the silver pull-tab top.
description_view_1: Side view with mostly plain red surface, only a sliver of the logo visible on the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a completely plain red surface with no visible logo or text.
description_view_3: Another rear-side view, showing only the red surface and the top of the can.
attribute_brand_logo: A white Coca-Cola script logo is visible on the front side of the can, vertically oriented, with a classic cursive font.
